Iron Shortsword.name: Iron Shortsword
Iron Shortsword.description: A well-balanced iron blade for quick cuts in close quarters.

Wooden Arrows.name: Wooden Arrows
Wooden Arrows.description: Straight-shafted arrows fletched with feathers and tipped with iron points.

Battle Axe.name: Battle Axe
Battle Axe.description: A heavy iron war axe built for brutal two-handed cuts through armor gaps and bone.

Light Crossbow.name: Light Crossbow
Light Crossbow.description: A compact crossbow with an iron prod and simple trigger mechanism.

Crossbow Bolts.name: Crossbow Bolts
Crossbow Bolts.description: Short, thick bolts with iron points designed to punch into armor and hide.

Iron Dagger.name: Iron Dagger
Iron Dagger.description: A simple double-edged iron knife for close combat, utility work, and desperate moments.

Short Spear.name: Short Spear
Short Spear.description: A short wooden shaft tipped with leaf-shaped iron, useful one-handed or from behind a shield.

Wooden Staff.name: Wooden Staff
Wooden Staff.description: A length of seasoned hardwood reinforced with iron bands at each end.

Throwing Knife.name: Throwing Knife
Throwing Knife.description: A balanced iron blade made for accurate throws at exposed flesh and weak points.

Lockpick Set.name: Lockpick Set
Lockpick Set.description: A worn leather roll containing tension wrenches, rake picks, and hook picks.

Leather Cuirass.name: Leather Cuirass
Leather Cuirass.description: A hardened leather chest piece scarred by old blows but still reliable.

Iron Warhammer.name: Iron Warhammer
Iron Warhammer.description: A flanged iron hammer built to crush armor, bone, and brittle bodies.

Short Bow.name: Short Bow
Short Bow.description: A compact bow suited to quick draws and close-range archery.

Trick Blade.name: Trick Blade
Trick Blade.description: A concealed spring blade disguised as an innocuous object.

Loaded Dice.name: Loaded Dice
Loaded Dice.description: A pair of bone dice weighted to favor certain outcomes.

Silver Binding Chain.name: Silver Binding Chain
Silver Binding Chain.description: Enchanted silver links that resist breaking and gleam brighter near supernatural creatures.

Linen Tunic.name: Linen Tunic
Linen Tunic.description: A plain tunic of undyed linen, comfortable but not protective.

Cloth Trousers.name: Cloth Trousers
Cloth Trousers.description: Rough-spun wool breeches patched at the knees from long wear.

Worn Breeches.name: Worn Breeches
Worn Breeches.description: Once-luxurious velvet breeches, aged but still elegantly cut.

Faded Doublet.name: Faded Doublet
Faded Doublet.description: A well-tailored but aging silk doublet whose rich colors have softened with time.

Woven Robe.name: Woven Robe
Woven Robe.description: A robe of overlapping leaves and bark that shifts color to match nearby foliage.

War Bow.name: War Bow
War Bow.description: A tall laminated bow that requires strength to draw and drives arrows with force.

Long Bow.name: Long Bow
Long Bow.description: A tall laminated bow with superior range and penetrating power.

Mongo's Medium Health Potion.name: Mongo's Medium Health Potion
Mongo's Medium Health Potion.description: A vial of crimson liquid that restores vitality when consumed.

Maple Lute.name: Maple Lute
Maple Lute.description: A well-used pear-shaped lute with delicate fretwork and the marks of countless performances.

Smith's Hammer.name: Smith's Hammer
Smith's Hammer.description: A well-balanced steel hammer used for shaping hot metal on an anvil.

Woodworking Tools.name: Woodworking Tools
Woodworking Tools.description: A collection of saws, chisels, planes, and measuring tools for working wood.

Leatherworking Tools.name: Leatherworking Tools
Leatherworking Tools.description: A set of knives, awls, needles, and edge tools for cutting and stitching leather.

Sewing Kit.name: Sewing Kit
Sewing Kit.description: A compact pouch containing needles, thread, scissors, and pins for textile work.

Battle Mace.name: Battle Mace
Battle Mace.description: A heavy flanged mace with a reinforced steel head for crushing armor and bone.

Artificer's Toolkit.name: Artificer's Toolkit
Artificer's Toolkit.description: A leather satchel of fine screwdrivers, jeweler's loupes, wire, calipers, hammers, and arcane scribing tools.

Leather Jerkin.name: Leather Jerkin
Leather Jerkin.description: A vest of hardened leather that protects the torso without restricting the arms.

Linen Robe.name: Linen Robe
Linen Robe.description: A simple ankle-length robe suitable for scholars, clergy, or common folk.

Iron Breastplate.name: Iron Breastplate
Iron Breastplate.description: Hammered iron plates riveted over leather backing, heavy enough to turn serious blows.

Leather Leggings.name: Leather Leggings
Leather Leggings.description: Treated leather leggings that resist tearing on thorns and rough ground.

Wooden Round Shield.name: Wooden Round Shield
Wooden Round Shield.description: A round shield of layered wood bound with iron at the rim.

Leather Boots.name: Leather Boots
Leather Boots.description: Sturdy tanned leather boots for long journeys and rough roads.

Craftsman's Toolkit.name: Craftsman's Toolkit
Craftsman's Toolkit.description: A broad set of hammers, saws, chisels, needles, and punches for everyday craftwork.

Wool Cloak.name: Wool Cloak
Wool Cloak.description: A simple undyed wool cloak that keeps off cold wind and light rain.

Leather Gloves.name: Leather Gloves
Leather Gloves.description: Supple leather gloves that protect the hands while preserving fine control.

Iron Helm.name: Iron Helm
Iron Helm.description: A hammered iron helmet with cheek guards and a nasal bar.

Cloth Hood.name: Cloth Hood
Cloth Hood.description: A rough-spun cloth hood that protects against wind and weather, not weapons.

Iron Greaves.name: Iron Greaves
Iron Greaves.description: Iron plates strapped over leather to guard the shins and knees.

Vampire Hunter's Crossbow.name: Vampire Hunter's Crossbow
Vampire Hunter's Crossbow.description: A compact crossbow of dark wood and steel, ward-etched for quiet work against undead prey.

Silver-Tipped Bolts of Radiance.name: Silver-Tipped Bolts of Radiance
Silver-Tipped Bolts of Radiance.description: Blessed crossbow bolts with silver heads that burn undead, fiends, and shadow-bound creatures.

florins.name: florins
florins.description: The standard trade coin throughout Larion.
